Powered by Gemini 1.5 Pro

Your hiring pipeline
is probably biased.

Upload candidate data. Get an AI fairness audit in seconds — bias findings, correlation heatmap, and a PDF report your HR team can act on.

73% of Indian recruiters say college name influences shortlisting
2.4× more likely rejected from a Tier 3 college vs Tier 1
41% of gender pay gap traces to biased initial screening
01

Load candidate data

Upload a CSV or try our synthetic India hiring dataset modeled on real Bangalore/Mumbai recruiting patterns.

↑

Drop your CSV here

or click to browse — columns: name, gender, college_tier, location, years_exp, hired

15 candidates · synthetic but realistic
02

Data preview

03

Run audit

Gemini analyzes gender, college tier, location, and experience patterns against your hiring outcomes.

Each cell = hire rate (%) for that Gender × College Tier combination. Red = higher bias risk.

Audit report ready

Download a formatted PDF to share with your HR team or compliance officer.
